## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes and new behavior has a test
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] docs / README updated if user-facing
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
